warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
The fukui-reactivity task was run on phenol using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The geometry was sourced from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. The calculation was performed with charge 0 and multiplicity 1.

The most electrophilic site is Carbon at index 2 (1-based label 3) with a Fukui function f+ value of 2.1028319. The most nucleophilic site is Oxygen at index 0 (1-based label 1) with a Fukui function f- value of 0.16201477.
